spec.name: Deep In The Forest Of Miden'nir
spec.description: There is a sickening stench here. It smells of blood and death. To the north, you catch glimpses of daylight. To the east, you simply cannot see. The trees are close and stifling.

north.description: You see daylight and a trail to follow.

east.description: The stench seems to becoming from this direction.
